acceptance.assertion: Mechanic is limited to normal non-privileged grips.
Every action records target and scope.
Every action emits or links a receipt.

goal: Allow a Mechanic loop to run normal receipt-bound grips such as tests, branch publish, PR update, review request, friction triage, and post-merge sync.

metadata.claim_mode_note: Task claim mode describes implementation repository access; resulting grip effects are documented separately.
metadata.note: Bureau state was stale relative to GitHub; this registry update records the merged Mechanic/Captain boundary slice.

title: Add mechanic normal-action loop
